military.title: U.S. Navy test-fires first ship-based hypersonic missile in Pacific trial
military.raw_summary: The U.S. Navy successfully launched a conventional prompt-strike hypersonic weapon from a destroyer for the first time during a Pacific exercise, reaching speeds above Mach 5. Officials called it a milestone in fielding sea-based long-range strike, with the system slated to deploy across the destroyer fleet over the next two years.

military.title: South Korea unveils autonomous 'wingman' combat drone to fly alongside KF-21 jets
military.raw_summary: South Korea revealed a new stealthy uncrewed combat aircraft designed to pair with the KF-21 fighter, marking the country's debut in the collaborative-combat-aircraft field. The prototype is built for autonomous strike and electronic-warfare missions and adds to a small club of nations developing AI loyal-wingman drones.

military.title: Germany orders first batch of laser air-defense systems for frigates
military.raw_summary: Germany has placed its first production order for high-energy laser weapons to defend navy frigates against drones and fast boats, following two years of at-sea trials. The directed-energy system offers a low cost-per-shot answer to swarming drone threats.

military.title: Pentagon outlines fiscal plan for next-generation logistics software
military.raw_summary: A Defense Department memo discusses budgeting priorities and contracting reform for back-office logistics IT, with officials commenting on the need for modernization.

business.title: Startup demonstrates room-temperature solid-state battery with 1,000-km range cell
business.raw_summary: A battery startup showed an automotive-grade solid-state cell that it says enables roughly 1,000 km of range and ten-minute charging, with a pilot production line opening this year. Independent labs verified the energy density in early testing, a potential breakthrough for electric vehicles.

business.title: Chipmaker reveals first 1.4-nanometer test chip ahead of 2028 production
business.raw_summary: A leading foundry unveiled a working 1.4nm-class test chip, claiming sizable gains in power efficiency, and laid out a roadmap toward volume manufacturing in 2028. The new node could extend performance scaling for AI accelerators.

business.title: Robotics firm launches humanoid that learns warehouse tasks by watching once
business.raw_summary: A robotics company launched a humanoid robot that can pick up new warehouse tasks from a single human demonstration using a new imitation-learning model. Pilot customers report it handling order-picking with minimal setup.

crypto.title: New layer-1 'Helios' debuts with parallel execution, hits 100k TPS in public testnet
crypto.raw_summary: A new layer-1 blockchain called Helios launched its public testnet, posting over 100,000 transactions per second using parallel execution and a novel consensus design. Developers are watching whether the throughput holds under real-world load before mainnet.

crypto.title: Ethereum activates upgrade cutting layer-2 fees by an estimated 90%
crypto.raw_summary: Ethereum's latest network upgrade went live, expanding data capacity for rollups and driving layer-2 transaction fees down sharply. Several major rollups reported fees falling to a fraction of a cent.

economics.title: Japan's central bank raises rates as inflation holds above target
economics.raw_summary: The Bank of Japan raised its benchmark interest rate for the first time in over a year, citing persistent inflation and rising wages, a notable shift after decades of ultra-loose policy. The yen strengthened on the news.

economics.title: Analysts debate the outlook for global growth
economics.raw_summary: Commentators offer differing opinions on where the world economy is headed next year, with the usual mix of optimism and caution.

diamonds.title: Stealthy battery startup Volta raises $40M Series A to mass-produce sodium-ion cells
diamonds.raw_summary: Volta, a two-year-old startup, raised a $40M Series A led by a major VC to scale cheap sodium-ion batteries that avoid lithium supply constraints.

diamonds.title: Nvidia takes minority stake in robotics-foundation-model startup
diamonds.raw_summary: Nvidia made a strategic investment in a startup building general-purpose models for industrial robots, deepening its push beyond chips into the robotics stack.

diamonds.title: Show HN: an open-source tool that runs LLMs on a Raspberry Pi cluster
diamonds.raw_summary: A developer released an open-source framework letting hobbyists run mid-size language models across cheap Raspberry Pi clusters, hitting the HN front page.

diamonds.title: arXiv: room-temperature single-photon source could slash quantum-networking cost
diamonds.raw_summary: Researchers report a room-temperature single-photon emitter that may dramatically lower the cost of building quantum communication networks.
